global.description: The ad features a dark background with various abstract shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to stream new hits weekly.

elements.label: dark background

elements.label: top right element

elements.label: NeonCast UGC

elements.label: streaming message
elements.description: A clear, inviting message in the center, encouraging viewers to engage with the content.

elements.label: Order now button
